problem id: 3a72f760
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHL(6)

examples:
  11001111 -> 11111100
  10011001 -> 11011001
  00100100 -> 01000010
  00000010 -> 10100000
  11000101 -> 01011100
  00001000 -> 10000000
  01110010 -> 10100111
  01010101 -> 01010101

query: 11011010
predicted answer: 10101101
